title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 491.370 - Cost of surplus witnesses paid by whom
text:
491.370.  Cost of surplus witnesses paid by whom. — If either party subpoena more than three witnesses to prove any one fact, or shall subpoena any person or persons and not examine them as witnesses on the trial, he shall pay the costs occasioned by such surplus or unnecessary witness or witnesses, unless the testimony of such unexamined witnesses shall be rendered unnecessary by admissions of the opposite party on the trial.
(RSMo 1939 § 2657, A.L. 1945 p. 765 § 93) 
Prior revisions: 1929 § 2271; 1919 § 2821; 1909 § 7498
